tweets.text:
Trump will ring the NYSE bell next week from the oval office.

The first and only other time he rang the NYSE bell was on Dec 12th 2024.

The $SPY dropped .52% that day.

The $QQQ dropped .65% that day.

Extrapolate how you see fit.

$SPX in the last 14 years:

July went 13 greens 1 red

August went 8 greens 6 reds

September went 7 greens 7 reds

October went 8 greens 6 reds

So solely based on this simplified trend: enjoy July for now before we enter a potentially much volatile following 3 months…

tweets.text:
Strait of Hormuz over the last 24 hours.

Just a quick cheat guide: any tanker ending with "prosperity" or "b" will be used for ship-to-ship transfers via the Oman lane under US escorts.

VLCC inbound tanker flow, excluding Iran, is around 4 a day right now, or 8 million b/d.

Most of the inbound tankers using the Iran route are limited to Iranian flows and products. 

I have included the video from @MarineTraffic and the last two days for reference.
